description: T633 ContentVersionPublisher MUST use storeDocumentWithOCC(content, versionNumber) for atomic DRAFT→PUBLISHED state transition. OCC prevents concurrent publishes of same content version. CF-22-1.
blockConditions: T633 calls plain storeDocument() instead of storeDocumentWithOCC()
OCC conflict handling absent from T633
storeDocumentWithOCC() not invoked with versionNumber parameter
passConditions: T633 uses storeDocumentWithOCC(content, versionNumber) for publish operation
OCC_CONFLICT emits ContentPublicationFailed and returns DataProcessResult.failure
Version mismatch detected and handled before write

description: T633 ContentVersionPublisher MUST validate content metadata completeness at ORDER 1 before publish. All required fields (title, slug, publishedAt) must exist. Empty metadata blocks publish.
blockConditions: T633 publishes content with missing title or slug field
publishedAt timestamp absent from content draft
metadata validation not performed at executionOrder=1
passConditions: T633 validates metadata at executionOrder=1 before OCC write
Missing required fields return ContentPublicationFailed without attempting write
publishedAt set to current timestamp via serverTime

description: T633 ContentVersionPublisher MUST emit ContentPublished event with contentId, version, publishedAt, authorId on successful publish. Event envelope is CloudEvents standard.

description: T633 ContentVersionPublisher generation prompt MUST include: (1) Optimistic Concurrency Control via versionNumber, (2) DRAFT→PUBLISHED immutable state transition, (3) metadata validation at ORDER 1, (4) authorId ownership check, (5) CloudEvents ContentPublished emission, (6) outbox pattern enforcement. description: T634 ContentApprovalWorkflow MUST execute approval stages sequentially — stages never run in parallel. Approval stage order is MACHINE constant. CF-22-2.
blockConditions: T634 initiates approval stages in parallel using Promise.all()
Stage order not enforced sequentially
Approval stage execution not blocked after first stage failure
passConditions: T634 executes approval stages sequentially via for-loop
Each stage awaits completion before next stage starts
Stage failure at any ORDER blocks subsequent stages

description: T634 ContentApprovalWorkflow MUST implement 4 sequential approval gates: (1) Technical Review at ORDER 1, (2) Legal Compliance at ORDER 2, (3) Editorial at ORDER 3, (4) Final Release at ORDER 4. Each gate has role-based reviewer assignment from FREEDOM config.
blockConditions: Approval stages missing or not matching 4-stage pipeline
Gate role assignment not from FREEDOM config
Stage order not enforced (ORDER 1-4)
passConditions: T634 has 4 sequential approval gates with ORDER 1-4

Each stage requires approval before proceeding

description: T634 ContentApprovalWorkflow MUST emit separate CloudEvents for each stage transition: ContentReviewStarted, ContentReviewApproved, ContentReviewRejected. Rejection at any stage must include rejectionReason and return to DRAFT.
blockConditions: Stage transition events not emitted
ContentReviewRejected event missing rejectionReason field
Rejected content not returned to DRAFT status
passConditions: Each stage emits CloudEvents-compliant event on transition

description: T634 ContentApprovalWorkflow MUST validate reviewer role at each stage at ORDER 1+N. Reviewer must have required role for stage (Technical, Legal, Editorial, Release). tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage only — never from event payload.

Non-authorized reviewer can approve/reject without role
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS

description: T635 ContentScheduleDispatcher MUST use SETNX lock per scheduled publish entry for exactly-once semantics. Lock key includes contentId + publishAt timestamp. Lock must be acquired at ORDER 1 before any state mutation. CF-22-3.
blockConditions: T635 does not use SETNX lock for schedule entry
Lock acquired after state mutation instead of ORDER 1
Lock key missing publishAt timestamp
passConditions: T635 acquires SETNX lock at executionOrder=1
Lock key format: schedule:{contentId}:{publishAt}
Lock prevents duplicate scheduled dispatch of same entry

description: T635 ContentScheduleDispatcher MUST validate publishAt timestamp is in the future at ORDER 1. Past or current timestamps return ScheduleRejected without acquiring lock. Schedule entry stored with status=PENDING before CRON dispatch.
blockConditions: T635 accepts publishAt timestamp in past
Validation not at executionOrder=1 before lock
PENDING schedule stored without timestamp validation
passConditions: publishAt validated >= now() + 60 seconds at ORDER 1

description: T635 ContentScheduleDispatcher MUST emit CloudEvents: (1) ScheduleCreated on successful entry, (2) ScheduleDispatched when CRON trigger fires and content publishes, (3) ScheduleAbandoned if content deleted before publishAt. Each event includes contentId, scheduleId, publishAt, status.

ScheduleDispatched event missing contentId or publishAt

passConditions: ScheduleCreated emitted after schedule SETNX lock success
